## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss content strategy, lead generation, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New beauty and fashion playbooks being launched; content strategy to align with these](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Implementing gated content experiment on select high-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Shifting focus to leads generated rather than just clicks/impressions](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Planning content around upcoming retail events (e.g. spring sales)](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [Exploring different content creator types (employee, expert) for video commerce](https://fathom.video/share/xz-ULdeRy3t4ApDRDDSvttysrnvzzD23?tab=summary&timestamp=2223.0)
